summary: Phase 6: Ask Solomon Agentic AI testing complete. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend tests verified action confirmation cards, confirm/cancel buttons, and action execution. The Solomon chat correctly detects action intents and returns pending_action for cafe orders, donations, event registrations, group joins, and merch orders.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix during pytest (TEST_Latte, TEST_T-Shirt, TEST_Missions Fund, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Solomon Agentic AI fully tested and working. All 7 action types (cafe_order, merch_order, donation, recurring_giving, event_registration, group_join, checkin) execute correctly. Frontend action confirmation cards appear with Confirm/Cancel buttons. The _parse_action_from_response() function correctly extracts action blocks from Claude's response.

chat_non_action_query.details: POST /api/solomon/chat with non-action query (e.g., 'What time is Sunday service?') returns response WITHOUT pending_action

chat_action_query.details: POST /api/solomon/chat with action query (e.g., 'Order me a latte') returns response WITH pending_action containing action_type, params, display_summary, confirmation_id

cafe_order_action.details: cafe_order action creates record in cafe_orders collection with items, pickup_time, total, status='placed', source='solomon_ai'

donation_action.details: donation action creates record in donations collection with amount, fund, person_id, status='pending', source='solomon_ai'

donation_validation.details: donation with amount=0 correctly rejected with 'amount must be positive' message

recurring_giving_action.details: recurring_giving action creates record in recurring_giving collection with amount, frequency, fund, status='active', source='solomon_ai'

event_registration_action.details: event_registration action searches events by name/title and creates registration record. Returns helpful message if event not found.

group_join_action.details: group_join action searches groups by name and creates group_members record. Returns helpful message if group not found.

merch_order_action.details: merch_order action creates record in merch_orders collection with items, total, status='placed', source='solomon_ai'

unknown_action_type.details: Unknown action type returns success=false with 'Unknown action' message

solomon_session_clear.details: DELETE /api/solomon/session/{session_id} clears session and returns confirmation

frontend_fab_button.details: Solomon FAB button visible in bottom-right corner with 'Ask Solomon' label

frontend_chat_panel.details: Solomon chat panel opens when FAB clicked, shows sample prompts

frontend_mic_button.details: Voice input mic button visible and clickable

frontend_action_card.details: Action confirmation card appears after action-triggering message with Confirm and Cancel buttons

frontend_confirm_action.details: Confirm button executes action, shows success message, dismisses card

frontend_cancel_action.details: Cancel button dismisses action card without executing
